reviews.text: Game Day has the most incredible team! Samantha, the nurse practitioner, is beyond amazing; knowledgeable, caring, and takes the time to explain everything. My husband usually dreads doctor visits, but Game Day feels like a completely different atmosphere. It's very relaxed, judgment-free, and designed just for men. They also offer weight loss and vitamin therapy, which I love because women can enjoy too! Even the owner, Mitch, made a lasting impression. He took time out of his day to personally meet my husband, and we saw him do the same with others. This is something you rarely see! You can tell he truly values every patient. Game Day deserves way more than five stars — this entire staff is top-tier and genuinely cares about their patients! So glad to be apart of the Game Day family!❤️

reviews.text: I've been taking the compounded semaglutide for 8 months now. I'm down 40 lbs! The loss was very slow at first and picked up around month 5. So don't give up. While not diabetic, having children and having my thyroid removed wreaked havoc on my body and I believe I had some degree of insulin resistance.

reviews.text: I had never looked into my hormone levels but I’m so glad I did! My levels were all over the place- I was tired all the time, sleeping terribly, and overly stressed in general! I visited Midwest Hormone Center in Lawrence and it’s been a GAME CHANGER! I have more energy to tackle anything the day has in store. I wake up revived and rested. I have my spark back! I cannot stress enough- personal health is KEY, and that includes making sure your hormones are in balance and you’re functioning at your best! The staff here at the clinic are all amazing. So friendly, informative, always smiling and they truly take your specific needs to heart! Quality care close to home! You won’t be disappointed!

reviews.text:
I could not be more grateful for Dr. Sutton and her team.  After my former doctor retired, I was not informed the practice would no longer be prescribing HRT.  Only when my prescription ran out did I find out.  Dr. Sutton to the rescue!  She made every effort to get me in quickly, complete labs and returned the results very quickly to get me restarted.  She is kind, compassionate, and brilliant!  I am so grateful that she takes the time to explain every lab result, what they mean and then discusses the options.    I feel better than I ever have.

I will absolutely recommend Dr. Sutton again and again.

reviews.text: My goal for this year is to prioritize my health. Making an appointment with Dr. Sutton has been the best decision to help me with my goals. She made me feel so comfortable and took the time to listen to my concerns and thoughts about what I’d like to gain from my visit. She educated me on so many aspects of my overall health and was able to equip me with a plan to help me make this year a year of accomplishment.  As an added bonus I was able to meet Cory and Gretchen and found myself falling in love with the whole office and many of their additional aesthetic offerings as well. I have always been interested in Botox but it wasn’t until I met Cory that I felt comfortable enough to say yes and experience my first procedure. My results were perfect snd I can’t say enough about how great I feel already.

reviews.text: Dr. Sutton is absolutely amazing. She takes time to sit down with you and actually get to know you. You can tell just how much she loves what she does. reviews.name: places/ChIJ9xNNfs3DwIcRzI0Qnu7cMb8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhdXBHdVBnEAE
reviews.text: I have been under Doctor Sutton's care now for going on 8 months and it has been truly life-changing. Having undergone a radical hysterectomy at the age 24 with no hormone replacement that worked, I literally walked into her office feeling like The Walking Dead. Through working with her we were able to restore my hormonal balance and restore a quality of life I have not experienced for decades!  I think one of the best things about her is she truly listened to me about how I felt, she stayed in constant communication with me, made follow-up phone calls after we adjusted medication and kept me informed about where I was in the process. Thank you Doctor Sutton for giving me back  a life and health I could fully enjoy!!

reviews.text:
Review for men:

I had mixed results.  Some good, some not so good.  The doctor, Dr. Felts is very knowledgeable and kind.

At my first consultation, I decided to give testosterone injections a go.

I started with 100mg injection, followed by an estrogen blocker.  The first month went great.  I felt energetic, I felt more positive overall, and confident.

At the start of the second month, I was asked to “come in for a second consultation.”  I did.  And this is where the trouble started.

After meeting with Dr. Felts, the meeting went well.  He stepped out and Mina, his assistant stepped in to give me an injection.  They up’d my dose to 200mg weekly, plus the estrogen blocker.  She injected me and everything went seemingly well at first, but when I got home, I noticed TWO injection sites.

I didn’t think much of it, but as days went on, I felt off.  Like something was injected affecting my cognition.  I also started having a weird form of ED where it would go soft just as the feeling of ejaculation was nearing.  I’ve NEVER had this happen before.  It was like my CNS was affected somehow.  Plus my libido kind of tanked???

I brought this up to Dr. Felts and assured me everything was “okay, but my mind was out of sync with my body.”

I continued on the 200mg per week of self injections, and ordered a three month supply.  My energy, outlook, self confidence, my heart and endurance was strong, and workouts were decent.

However, I started noticing my body fat was increasing (counter intuitive, right?), I was becoming emotional (even bouts of aggression which I cannot have as a father), and I was getting frequent nose bleeds (perhaps due to increased RBC)…not to mention my testicles were at least half their normal size - which looked weird.

A few weeks in on 200mg, I had a routine check up scheduled with my PCP.  He tested my testosterone levels, which maxed out their test at 1500, but he took me off of the injections.  My estrogen levels were at 55 (normal should be 15 - 30 for men).

It was a serious struggle in many ways getting off of testosterone.  Terrible in fact.  I asked my PCP for Clomid to help minimize the side effects of stopping T, which is what bodybuilders do.

The bottom line is I would use caution if pursuing testosterone injections.  If you do move forward, Dr. Felts is a good choice, but plan to be on it for life.  If you have the money, you can add clomiphene or HCG to combat the sexual dysfunction and ball shrinkage side effects.

Things are always unique for me as I am targeted by everyone for reasons unknown.  I still wonder what was in that second shot causing the brain and CNS issue?  It’s mostly resolved but not completely.  I was rock hard down there prior to pursuing T injections (less five years ago when I was on other medication).

My advice is think it through and understand it is a money commitment and there can be side effects.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkzchFknqwIcR5L92JNGwWDQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWMGVqUmFlR1JwZEcxSlZHaHNaV0p0WjNCblIwRRAB
reviews.text:
I had such high hopes when I started my troches in May 2025.  However, after a couple of weeks of taking them I experienced edema and painful, swollen breasts. Upon calling the office the RN advised me to decrease my dose.  There was no relief with the dosage decrease so after consultation with prescribing RN, I chose to discontinue the troches.  My treatment agreement/contract that Alex Blome RN and I signed stated that I would
receive a refund for the unused portion of my contract. I could expect my refund in a couple of months according to Alex.  In September my refund hadn’t come through so I placed 4 calls to Alex.  She returned my call after a week and said she would check with corporate.  By November I had not received any updates regarding the status of my refund.  Three calls were made and voicemail left with no response.  I called again in December and a Shane Dodgen answered the phone and identified himself as the owner.  After a conversation regarding the issue of my refund he reassured me that he would see to it that my refund would be processed with in 10 business days.  He gave me his phone number and asked me to call him if I had any questions or if my refund did not come. As of today I have not received my refund. I have called his number 5 times from December to now.  Phone goes straight to voicemail and there has been no response.  I have sent a message to the corporate website, no response. I have called the “corporate office” asking for a call. No response. I have emailed a letter to corporate office.  No response.
Before signing any treatment agreement / contract be aware that this company has not respected their  agreement with me. Chances are this is their modus operandi.

It has now been 10 business days since the reply of the owner which expressed their regret for the lengthy delay and lack of communication regarding my refund. The owner (who did not provide their name or contact information) stated that my account would be escalated to their billing and compliance teams and that my refund would be processed immediately and they would provide me a status update.  The owner also stated that I would receive confirmation or the refund within seven business days.
As of today, Feb 16, 2026 I have not received any communication from the company via phone, text, email or mail.  I have checked my junk mail, spam, credit card for refund.  Nothing!
I address this to the owner,  provide your name and contact information and when I call please answer.
For future and current customers be aware of these business practices.
2/17/26. I visited the clinic today to personally deliver a letter regarding my account and was able to speak with Alex who informed me that the owner, Shane was present.  I was invited into the office where we discussed my account and a check for my refund was received to my satisfaction.

reviews.text: What can I say about the Wichita Kansas Limitless Male clinic other than that they’re totally awesome in their own way. reviews.name: places/ChIJw--1E6n9uocRnKhX_CxkK9c/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURndzhEdkFREAE
reviews.text: I would like to brag just a little about this companies phenomenal staff! I went in for my first consultation today and had a great experience, I was met at the front desk by Bella she has an amazing outgoing personality you can tell she loves her job and  welcoming in every patient with a great attitude. Then there was Carla she’s the I’ve breaker she took me back to pre-screen and draw blood for lab testing. I made it clear to her that drawing my blood makes me very anxious, I CANNOT express how quick and accurate she is I did not feel even a slight prick from the needle and in approximately 60 seconds she already had 3 tubes full of blood! Hands down she is the best at what she does from my personal experience! And then Brandon he’s full of energy and very knowledgeable about the product and how the whole process works. his ability to communicate in a way that you almost feel as if you’ve been good friends for years  makes it easier to be transparent about why your there in the first place! Even if I tried to find a reason to complain I just couldn’t, this facility and everybody that works there are the definition of humble professionalism. thank you for being as excited about doing your jobs as I am about being a new client and using your products! You all deserve a raise and the recognition for your efforts!

reviews.text: Absolutely the best medical staff around. I’m always in and out quickly and the service is amazing. Bella does an amazing job of always getting me scheduled in on the right time. I would absolutely recommend their services to anyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJw--1E6n9uocRnKhX_CxkK9c/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURReHFHN3RBRRAB
reviews.text: I want to say that I have absolutely loved my experience at Limitless Male at the Wichita location. I am 40 years old and take the testosterone replacement therapy and I am almost a full year in and feel as good as I did in my mid to late 20’s. There are many benefits to using this clinic opposed to online “cheaper” options but remember you get what you pay for. At the clinic you get blood pressure checked and skilled staff to do injections. Every 4 to 12 weeks blood work is ran and reviewed by their on-site practitioners to ensure the program is working accordingly. Not only are you well taken care of but you also get to enjoy the friendly reception from the staff, Bella Ramirez was my first point of contact when I came to the office and immediately made me feel very comfortable about seeking out trt. Since then she has taken on other responsibilities in the clinic and may not be at the front desk to give a friendly greeting but is always so personable, caring, and talkative when I see her in the back room! I couldn’t leave a great review of the clinic without giving a shoutout to the hard working staff like Bella who make it a priority to ensure patients are receiving top level care!!
